title: Von Thomas Next
description: A real catering operations and SEO-growth system with online booking, admin workflows, and city-service expansion planning.
body:
Von Thomas Next is a shipped operations platform for catering workflows.

It turns a messy service process into a web system: customers move through a clearer booking flow, the team gets admin visibility, and orders become easier to prepare without endless manual back-and-forth.

## What it supports

- Online catering configuration and booking flows.
- Admin workflows for day-to-day operational decisions.
- Inbox and communication visibility around customer requests.
- Order preparation, same-day edge cases, and kitchen-ready handoff.

## Recent work

The newest layer is a public-safe SEO expansion plan for local catering demand. We compared the shape of competitor landing pages, mapped city and service clusters, and turned that into a phased plan for city pages, money pages, and micro-local coverage.

The important part is restraint: the system should expand around real offers and crawlable pages, not mass-publish thin location spam.

## Why it matters

This is the kind of software I like building: not a slide deck, not a toy AI demo, but an operational system that removes friction from a real business process and can grow through better distribution.

## Public boundary

This page does not include client-private data, internal process details, campaign data, or operational exports. It describes the public product surface, the SEO direction, and the type of workflows it supports.
